data.body: External change 8a9bb4308 (fix(plan-review): depends_on ancestor deliverable exists) landed on main, staling all 4 + CONFLICTING with 518(#8) in reviewers/plan_review_G1G2.md (both edited the symbol-existence guidance). Resolved locally keeping BOTH guidances (depends_on-ancestor-exists + third-party resolve_symbol/abstain), rebased+pushed 518. 515 517 521 rebased clean via REST. All 4 now on tip 8a9bb430 CI-ing. 6 bugs+skill done. Remaining: #9(515) #6(517) #8(518) #3-close(5147 via 521) 3b4e.
